sessions.summary: Fix PreCompact hook and debug Board startup

Extracted Node.js code to separate daily-log-hook.js file
Fixed stdin JSON parsing for Windows backslash paths
Made saveToGitHub silent by default to avoid token prompts
Done. `businessAreas` added to `event.schema.properties` in `emarsys_cdfl.schema.change.json` as an optional array of objects with `additionalProperties: true`.
Done. Added v2.2.2 changelog entry above v2.2.1.
